{{nihongo|'''Wono Shrine'''|小野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Musashi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wono Shrine'''|小野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Musashi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wono Shrine'''|小野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Musashi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wono Shrine'''|小野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Musashi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wono Shrine'''|小野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Musashi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wono Shrine'''|小野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Musashi Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Wono Shrine (Q135039727) | native_name = 小野神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Wono Shrine (Q135039727) | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Wono Shrine'''|小野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Musashi Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==
